title: HUALAI
description: Make the Golden Dandelion in Minecraft more useful!(Icon from Minecraft Speed Effect)
body:
# 花来(HUALAI)！

#### 阅读之前 BEFORE READING

两种语言有差异的以中文为主

If the English and Chinese versions don't match, trust the Chinese one.

#### 介绍 INTRODUCTION

使Minecraft的金蒲公英更加有用！

Make the Golden Dandelion in Minecraft more useful!

#### 软件运行环境 ENVIRONMENT

目前支持：Paper及其衍生服务端（Purpur,Leaves等，应该能行），Fabric（双端）

Support now : Paper and its forks(Purpur,Leaves .etc,may run),Fabric(Both server and client need)

#### 加载教程（Paper） HOW TO LOAD(PAPER)

1.  首先你必须有一个Paper服务器
2.  找到plugin文件夹
3.  复制，启动Paper服务器

---

1.  First,you need to have a paper server
2.  Find the plugin folder
3.  Copy,start the paper server

#### 加载教程（Fabric） HOW TO LOAD(FABRIC)

1.  首先你必须有一个Fabric服务器或客户端
2.  找到mods文件夹
3.  复制，启动

---

1.  First,you need to have a Fabric server or client
2.  Find the mods folder
3.  Copy,start

#### 使用说明

1.  首先你手上拿一朵金蒲公英（主副手皆可）
2.  右键！外骨骼启动！获得一个“超载”效果（在Paper版本中实际上就是一个带NBT标签的速度IV效果）
3.  通过杀其他生物持续该效果

---

1. Take a golden dandelion on your mainhand/offhand
2. Right click to get the OVERDRIVE effect (speed IV with a NBT tag in fact in Paper version)
3. Killing other entities to keep this effect

#### 特点 FEATURES

- 右键金蒲公英激活“超载”
- 获得20秒速度IV
- 杀其他生物获取额外3秒
- 被杀者失去“超载”效果

---

- Right-click Golden Dandelion to activate OVERDRIVE mode
- Gain Speed IV effect for 20 seconds
- Kill any entity to extend the duration by 3 seconds
- Killed players will lose their OVERDRIVE effect

#### 注意事项 NOTICE

1. 不要在拥有“超载”状态的时候使用其他任何速度效果!这是一件最重要的事情!任何其他速度效果会干扰“超载”效果使其强制停止（仅Paper）
2. 喝牛奶或蜂蜜同样会使其强制停止

---

1. DON'T USE ANY OTHER SPEED EFFECT WHEN YOU HAVE THE OVERDRIVE EFFECT!This is one of the most important things!Any other speed effect will stop the overdrive effect(Paper only)
2. Drinking milk or honey will also stop the overdrive effect

#### 差异 DIFFERENCE

1. Paper版本会直接替换金蒲公英的所有功能，拿上金蒲公英右键直接使用；但Fabric版本保留了其原有功能（放置，停止生物生长）这是一个bug，准备在新版本改掉
2. 实现不同：Paper通过一个速度效果+NBT判断，Fabric通过一个独立的效果判断

---

1. In the Paper version, the Golden Dandelion's functionality is completely overridden, enabling instant use with a right-click. In the Fabric version, its vanilla behaviors (placement and suspending mob growth) are preserved.This is a bug and will fix in the new version
2. The way to make it is different:Paper made it by using a speed effect + NBT,but Fabric made it by using a custom effect

#### 结束语 CONCLUSION

1. 我忽然意识到Modrinth支持多语言，因此在Modrinth上我使用了多语言版
2. 中国人，会有英语语法错误，实在影响阅读的可以给AI，两种语言含义不同的中文为准（开头已讲）
3. 待办事项（TODO）:
    - 更新spigot版
    - 等待正式版papermc 26.1.1(目前插件使用第29个构建版本)
    - 等待正式版papermc 26.1.2(目前插件使用第5个构建版本)
    - 支持Neoforge（可能的话再加入对forge的支持）
    - 制作新项目

---

1. I found out that Modrinth supports the MULTI-LANGUAGE,so I used Multi-Language version on Modrinth
2. I am a Chinese,there will be grammar mistakes,give AI if you really can't understand,if the English and Chinese versions don't match, trust the Chinese one.(said at beginning)
3. TODO:
    - Update the spigot version
    - Wait for stable papermc 26.1.1(Using the 29th build version now)
    - Wait for stable papermc 26.1.2(Using the 5th build version now)
    - Support the Neoforge(add the forge version if possible)
    - Make a new project
